maml:description.maml:para: Retrieves branches from a repository on GitHub or GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Creates a new branch in a repository on GitHub or GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Source ref to branch from (defaults to default branch)
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Source ref to branch from (defaults to default branch)
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Deletes a branch from a repository on GitHub or GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Closes a change request on GitHub or GitLab without merging.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
List or get change requests (pull requests / merge requests)
Retrieves change requests from GitHub (pull requests) or GitLab (merge requests). Supports filtering by state, author, branches, and more.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Filter to only draft change requests
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Only show change requests created after this date
Filter by state (open, closed, merged, all)
Only show change requests created before this date
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Filter to only draft change requests
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Only show change requests created after this date
Filter by state (open, closed, merged, all)
Only show change requests created before this date
Get approvals on a change request
Retrieves approval reviews from a change request on GitHub or GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Get comments on a change request
Retrieves comments from a change request on GitHub or GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Merges a change request on GitHub or GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Delete the source branch after merging
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Delete the source branch after merging
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Create a change request (pull request / merge request)
Creates a new pull request on GitHub or merge request on GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Updates an existing change request on GitHub or GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Retrieves commit information from a repository on GitHub or GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Only show commits after this date
Only show commits before this date
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Only show commits after this date
Only show commits before this date
Add a member to a group or organization
Adds a user to an organization on GitHub or group on GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Retrieves organization information from GitHub or group information from GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Show only groups you belong to
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Show only groups you belong to
Retrieves members of an organization on GitHub or group on GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Remove a member from a group or organization
Removes a user from an organization on GitHub or group on GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Closes an issue on GitHub or GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.

Retrieves issues from GitHub or GitLab. Supports filtering by state, assignee, author, labels, and more. Automatically detects the forge provider from the current git remote, or specify one explicitly with -Forge.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Show only issues assigned to you
Only show issues created after this date
Filter by issue state (open, closed, all)
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Show only issues assigned to you
Only show issues created after this date
Filter by issue state (open, closed, all)
Creates a new issue on GitHub or GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Add a comment to an issue
Adds a comment to an existing issue on GitHub or GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Reopens a previously closed issue on GitHub or GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Updates an existing issue on GitHub or GitLab. Supports changing title, description, and state.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.

Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Retrieves releases from a repository on GitHub or GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Retrieves repository information from GitHub or project information from GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified

Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Permanently deletes a repository on GitHub or project on GitLab.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Runs the command in a mode that only reports what would happen without performing the actions.
Searches for repositories on GitHub or projects on GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Retrieves user profile information from GitHub or GitLab.
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Retrieves activity events for a user on GitHub or GitLab. Supports filtering by date range, action type, and target type.
Filter by action type (e.g., pushed, commented)
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Get activity for the authenticated user
Only show events after this date
Filter by target type (e.g., issue, merge_request)
Only show events before this date
Filter by action type (e.g., pushed, commented)
Forge provider (github, gitlab). Auto-detected from git remote if not specified
Maximum number of pages to retrieve
Get activity for the authenticated user
Only show events after this date
Filter by target type (e.g., issue, merge_request)
Only show events before this date
